creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jean-Paul Beconne from comment #9)

Still builds fail for me - please consider using Poudriere for testing, and have the QA result attached to your future patches.

ERROR: dependency 'knitr' is not available for package 'roxygen2'
* removing '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/R-cran-roxygen2/work/stage/usr/local/lib/R/library/roxygen2'
*** Error code 1
